clEntries.5.11.103: v5.11.103: Full eWeLink/SONOFF WiFi local LAN support - 10 new drivers: Switch (BASIC/MINI/RF/SV/R4), 2-Channel (DUAL R3), 4-Channel (4CH Pro), Plug (S20/S26), Power Monitor (S31/POW R2/R3/Elite), TH Sensor (TH10/TH16/THR316), Dimmer (D1), Fan (iFan03/04), Bulb (B02/B05), LED Strip (L1/L2). AES-128-CBC encrypted LAN protocol with HTTP REST API control.
clEntries.5.11.102: v5.11.102: Fixed SOS button CIE enrollment (IEEEAddressManager). Fixed LCD sensor _TZE200_vvmbj46n detection + humidity divisor. Added luminance DP101 for _TZE200_pay2byax contact sensor.
clEntries.5.11.101: v5.11.101: Full eWeLink/SONOFF support (49 fingerprints across 17 drivers: ZBMINI, SNZB-01/02/03/04/05/06P, TRVZB, S26R2ZB, S31/S40/S60ZB, ZBMINI-DIM). WiFi local: added protocol 3.2, Cloud API getDeviceStatus/sendDeviceCommands/getDeviceSpecification, getDiagnostics(). Fixed 6 unconfigured workflow secrets. App icon now transparent per Homey guidelines. README auto-regenerated on every push with App Version row.
clEntries.5.11.100: v5.11.99: Regenerated all 145 driver images from SVG icons., Fixed detection of the latest draft., Improved draft detection by adding state checks., Fixed clicking on the SUBMISSION link., Resolved issues with the 'Publish to Test' button detection.
clEntries.5.11.99: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.99: Regenerated driver images and fixed various draft detection issues.
clEntries.5.11.98: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.98 fixes IAS issues and improves draft detection.
clEntries.5.11.97: Fixed draft detection logic and improved build pipeline.
clEntries.5.11.96: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.96: Fixed draft detection and updated screenshots.
clEntries.5.11.95: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.95: Fixed navigation issue and updated drivers and fingerprints.
clEntries.5.11.94: Improved device compatibility and updated fingerprints.
